displayName: Course Reserves — Single Permanent Course Report
description: Checkout counts for one or more specific courses with permanent reserves (items that have no reserve end date). Date range filters apply to checkout counts only. Historical toggle controls whether non-current reserve records are included.

parameters.name: course_codes
parameters.displayName: Course code(s) — comma-separated (e.g. CS 101, ENGL 39). Spaces between letters and digits are normalized automatically.

parameters.name: exclusions
parameters.displayName: Exclude course types — comma-separated flags [POP, LAW, NEW, EMPTY]

parameters.name: show_historical
parameters.displayName: Include non-current (inactive) reserve records (1 to toggle ON)
